title: Add project-local discovery and filtering flags
description: Include project-local/ when it exists as sibling of project/. Track source (shared vs local) in index. Add --no-local and --local-only flags for relevant commands.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Project-local discovery and filters implemented in python/src/taskulus/issue_listing.py + dependencies.py and rust/src/issue_listing.rs + dependencies.rs with --no-local and --local-only flags in CLI. Verified by features/discovery/project_discovery.feature, features/queries/local_listing.feature, and features/dependencies/dependencies.feature (behave + cucumber).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Index marks issues as shared or local; project-local/ discovered only as sibling; --no-local excludes local issues; --local-only shows only local issues.
